4. Qosob As-Sukkar (Sugarcane)

Sugar is a relatively new substance that the people of old did not mention or even have knowledge that it existed. This is why they did not describe its role in various types of drinks or cures. Honey, on the other hand, was extensively used as a drink and as a medicine.

Sugarcane is hot and wet, helps relieve coughing and dissipates the excess moistures in the body, prostate and chest. It is more effective as a laxative than sugar itself. In addition, sugarcane induces vomit. is diuretic and stimulates semen production.

Affan bin Muslim As-Saggar said, "Those who suck on sugarcane after eating their meal, will find comfort for the rest of his day." When sugarcane is broiled, it relieves the roughness in the throat and chest. Yet, it causes the accumulation of gasses that would be pacified when sugarcane is peeled and washed in hot water.

Sugar is hot and wet. The best type of sugar is white crystalline, especially when it is old. When sugar is boiled and skimmed, it quenches the thirst and relieves coughing. Sugarcane is not good for the stomach that suffers from bile. The side effects of sugarcane could be pacified by mixing it with lemon water (juice), Naranj (bitter orange) and peeled pomegranate.

Some people preter sugarcane to honey because it is not as hot as honey and because it is milder on the stomach. This is not fair for honey, which is much more profitable than sugarcane. In addition, Allah has made honey both a cure and a type of sweet. So how can anyone compare the benefits of honey and the benefits of sugarcane? Honev strengthens the stomach, soothes the natural process, strengthens the eyesight and heals diphtheria when gargled, facial paralysis and hemiplegia (paralysis affecting only one side of the body). It In addition helps against all types of cold illnesses that occur in the body because of excess moistures. Honey extracts and pulls excess moistures from the body, preserves the health, increases semen production, cleanses and decomposes the contents of the stomach, In addition, honey cleanses the intestines, fights worms and prevents septic repletion (over eating). Further, honey is a good type of food and favorable for those who suffer from phlegm and for old people. In short, no substance is more beneficial for the body as a food, as a remedy and as an ingredient and a preserver of medications, which In addition strengthens the stomach, than honey. There are many more benefits for honey. So how can anyone compare it to sugarcane, which does not have even a fraction of the benefits contained in honey?

The Letter Kaff Kitab (Books or Writings)

This chapter contains books or writings of divine remedies, Islamic prayer formulas, as Islamic amulets (prayer formulas written down and worm for a specific

purpose).* 1, An Amulet for Fever

Al-Mirwazi said, "Abu Abdullah (Imam Ahmad) was informed that was suffering from fever and he wrote to me a supplication for fever that reads like this, "In the Name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Beneficent. In the Name of Allah, and depending on Allah.

"We (Allch) said: 'O fire! Be you coolness and safety for IbrahJm (Abraham)! And they wanted to harm him, but We made them the worst losers.

O Allah, the Lord of (angels) Gabriel, Michael and Israfil: cure this person with this supplication by Your Power, Strength and Might, O Lord of the creation. Ameen.""

In addition, Al-Mirwazi said that Abu _ Ja'far, Muhammad bin Ali was asked about wearing [a written] Rugyah (divine remedy, Islamic prayer formula or

amulet). He said, "If it was from the Book of Allah or a Hadith [correctly] related from the Prophet, then wear it and use it as a remedy as much as possible." Abu Abdullah was listening to this narration and

In addition, Imam Ahmad did not object when he was asked about wearing a Ruqyah amulet after an illness or a calamity strikes. Al-Khallal In addition narrated that Abdullah bin Ahmad told him that his father used to write some supplication in a Rugyah amulet for those who have a certain fear and for fever after it strikes.

An Amulet for Difficult Pregnancies

In addition, AI-Khallal narrated that Abdullah bin Ahmad said that his father wrote a Rugqyah, Islamic prayer formula, as an Islamic amulet, on a pure object for women who suffered from difficult Pregnancies. In the, amulet, Ahmad wrote the Hadith narrated by Ibn Abbas, "There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah, the Most Forbearing, the Most Generous. All praise is due to Allah, the Lord of the Mighty Throne.

"All the praises and thanks are to Allah the Lord of the 'Alamin (mankind, jinn and all that exists)"

"The Day they see it, (it will be) as if they had not tarried (in this world) except an afternoon or a morning."

hikes GL Wigs I ayte gdb Onn Gad! (Fo) € QD opdnll al Yule us

"On the Day when they will see that (torment) with which they are promised (i.e. threatened, it will be) as if they had not stayed more than an hour in a single day. (O mankind! this Quran is sufficient as) a clear Message (or proclamation to save yourself from destruction). But shall any be destroyed except the people who are AI-Fasiqun (rebellious against Allah's Command. disobedient to Allah)?" (46:35)

Al-Khallal said that a man came to Abu Abdullah and asked him to write a Islamic prayer formula as an Islamic amulet for a woman who had gone into labor for two days. Imam Ahmad asked the man to bring a wide cup with some Saffron {and wrote the amulet for the man's wife]. He In addition narrated that Imam Ahmad wrote the same amulet for several other people.

It was reported that ‘Ikrimah narrated that Ibn Abbas said, "Jesus, the Messenger of Allah b once passed by a cow that was suffering from hard labor. The cow said [to Jesus], 'O, Word of Allah (be and he was)! Ask Allah to relieve me from what I am suffering from.’

He said, "O Creator of the soul from another soul, who brings to life a soul from within another soul, relieves her.' The cow then gave birth and soon started to smell her newly born." Ibn Abbas then said, "Therefore, when the woman is suffering from hard labor, write [and recite] this supplication for her."

The types of Islamic prayer formulas as Islamic amulets that we mentioned are beneficial, Allah willing. Further, several scholars among the Salaf have allowed writing the Qura'an and drinking its water as a cure.

Another Amulet for Pregnant Women

One should write the following Ayah in a pure pot:

"When the heaven is split asunder. In addition, listens to and obeys its Lord and it must do so. And when the earth is stretched forth, and has cast out ail that was in it and became empty." (84:1 - 4)

Then the pregnant woman should drink from this pot and pour some of it on her stomach,

An Amulet for Nosebleeds 464

Ibn Taymiyyah used to write the following Ayah on his forehead:

"And it was said: 'O earth! Swallow up your water, and O sky! Withhold (your rain). And the water was made to subside and the Decree (of Allah) was fulfilled (i.e. the destruction of the people (Noah).

I In addition heard him say, "I wrote [this A/oh] for several people and they were cured." He In addition said [about the Ayah], "It is not allowed to write it with the blood of the nosebleed as some ignorant people do, because blood is impure and one is not allowed to use it to write Allah's Speech.”

Another Amuiet for nose bleeds

It was reported that Prophet Musa .Once went out wearing an outer garment and then suffered from nosebleed and covered [his nose].

An Amulet for fungus One should write [the following for it:}

"then it is struck with a fiery whirlwind, so that it is burnt...2”

~-—— The Prophetic Medicine

Another Amulet for fungus

When the sun becomes yellow, one should write [the Ayah],

"O you who believe [in Musa fMoses) (i.e. Jews) and Musd (Jesus) (i.e.. Christians)|! Fear Allah, and believe in His Messenger (Muhammad gg) He will give you a double portion of His Mercy. and He will give you a light by which you shall walk (straight). And He will forgive you. And Allah is Oft-Forgiving. Most Merciful." (57:28)

An Amulet for three-day Fever

One should write on three separate papers, "In the Name of Allah it is running away. In the Name of Allah it has subsided. In the Name of Allah it has decreased."

Every day [that the fever lasts], one should swallow the paper with some water. An Amulet for sciatica

One should write, "In the Name of Allah. O Allah, Lord of everything, Owner of everything and Creator of everything! You have created the sciatic nerve and me. Do not give it power over me, nor allow me to cut it. Heal me completely and eradicate the illness. There is none who can heal except You."

An Amulet for bleeding veins

Al-Tirmidhi narrated that Ibn Abbas said that the Messenger of Allah b used to teach them to recite [the following Ruqyoh], against fever and various pains, 'In the Name of Allah, the Most Great, I seek refuge with Allah, the All-Mighty, from the evil of bleeding veins and from the evil of the fire's heat,"

An Amulet for Toothache

One should write on the cheek that is closer to the pain, "In the Name of Allah, Most Gracious, Most Merciful.

(understanding). Little thanks you give." (23:78) 467

——— The Prophetic Medicine Or,

"And to Him belongs whatsoever exists in the night and the day, and He is the All-Hearing, the AllKnowing." (6:13)

An Amulet for abscess

One should write [this amulet and place it] on the abscess,

"And they ask you concerning the mountains: say, "My Lord will blast them and scatter them as particles of dust. Then He shall leave them as a level smooth plain.”

4. Qosob As-Sukkar (Tebu)

Gula adalah zat yang relatif baru yang tidak disebutkan oleh orang-orang terdahulu, bahkan mereka tidak memiliki pengetahuan tentang keberadaannya. Inilah mengapa mereka tidak menjelaskan peranannya dalam berbagai jenis minuman atau obat-obatan. Madu, di sisi lain, digunakan secara luas sebagai minuman dan sebagai obat.

Tebu bersifat panas dan basah, membantu meredakan batuk dan menghilangkan kelebihan kelembapan dalam tubuh, prostat, dan dada. Tebu lebih efektif sebagai pencahar dibandingkan gula itu sendiri. Selain itu, tebu merangsang muntah, bersifat diuretik, dan merangsang produksi sperma.

Affan bin Muslim As-Saggar berkata, "Orang yang menghisap tebu setelah makan akan merasakan kenyamanan sepanjang harinya." Ketika tebu dipanggang, ia meredakan kekerasan pada tenggorokan dan dada. Namun, tebu menyebabkan penumpukan gas yang dapat diatasi dengan mengupas dan mencuci tebu dalam air panas.

Gula bersifat panas dan basah. Jenis gula terbaik adalah gula putih kristal, terutama yang sudah tua. Ketika gula direbus dan dibersihkan busanya, ia menghilangkan rasa haus dan meredakan batuk. Tebu tidak baik bagi lambung yang menderita empedu. Efek samping tebu dapat diatasi dengan mencampurnya dengan air lemon (jus), naranj (jeruk pahit), dan biji delima yang dikupas.

Sebagian orang lebih menyukai tebu daripada madu karena tidak sepanas madu dan lebih ringan bagi lambung. Ini tidaklah adil bagi madu, yang jauh lebih bermanfaat daripada tebu. Selain itu, Allah telah menjadikan madu sebagai obat sekaligus minuman yang manis. Lantas bagaimana seseorang bisa membandingkan manfaat madu dengan manfaat tebu? Madu menguatkan lambung, memperlancar proses alami tubuh, menguatkan penglihatan, dan menyembuhkan difteri bila digunakan untuk berkumur, kelumpuhan wajah, dan hemiplegia (kelumpuhan yang hanya mempengaruhi satu sisi tubuh). Selain itu, madu membantu melawan segala jenis penyakit dingin yang terjadi dalam tubuh akibat kelebihan kelembapan. Madu mengekstrak dan menarik kelebihan kelembapan dari tubuh, menjaga kesehatan, meningkatkan produksi sperma, membersihkan dan menguraikan isi lambung. Selain itu, madu membersihkan usus, membunuh cacing, dan mencegah kekenyangan yang menyebabkan pembusukan. Lebih jauh lagi, madu adalah jenis makanan yang baik dan bermanfaat bagi orang yang menderita dahak dan bagi orang tua. Singkatnya, tidak ada zat yang lebih bermanfaat bagi tubuh sebagai makanan, sebagai obat, sebagai bahan dan penjaga obat-obatan, yang juga menguatkan lambung, selain madu. Masih banyak lagi manfaat madu. Lantas bagaimana seseorang bisa membandingkannya dengan tebu, yang bahkan tidak memiliki sebagian kecil dari manfaat yang terkandung dalam madu?

Huruf Kaff Kitab (Buku atau Tulisan)

Bab ini memuat buku atau tulisan tentang obat-obatan ilahi, rumus do'a Islami, sebagai jimat-jimat Islami (rumus do'a yang ditulis dan dikenakan untuk tujuan tertentu).* 1. Jimat untuk Demam

Al-Mirwazi berkata, "Abu Abdullah (Imam Ahmad) diberitahu bahwa seseorang menderita demam, maka beliau menuliskan sebuah do'a untuk demam yang berbunyi demikian, 'Dengan nama Allah, Yang Maha Pengasih, lagi Maha Penyayang. Dengan nama Allah, dan bertawakkul kepada Allah.

"Kami (Allah) berfirman: 'Wahai api! Jadilah kamu dingin dan keselamatan bagi Ibrahim (Abraham)!' Dan mereka menghendaki kejahatan terhadapnya, tetapi Kami menjadikan mereka orang-orang yang paling merugi.

Ya Allah, Rabb (para malaikat) Jibril, Mikail, dan Israfil: sembuhkanlah orang ini dengan do'a ini dengan Kekuasaan, Kekuatan, dan Kemampuan-Mu, wahai Rabb sekalian makhluk. Aamiin.'"

Selain itu, Al-Mirwazi berkata bahwa Abu Ja'far, Muhammad bin Ali pernah ditanya tentang mengenakan Ruqyah [yang tertulis] (obat ilahi, rumus do'a Islami atau jimat). Beliau berkata, "Jika itu berasal dari Kitab Allah atau hadith yang [dengan benar] diriwayatkan dari Nabi, maka kenakanlah dan gunakanlah sebagai obat sebanyak mungkin." Abu Abdullah mendengar riwayat ini dan

Selain itu, Imam Ahmad tidak keberatan ketika ditanya tentang mengenakan jimat Ruqyah setelah penyakit atau musibah menimpa. Al-Khallal juga meriwayatkan bahwa Abdullah bin Ahmad memberitahunya bahwa ayahnya biasa menulis beberapa do'a dalam jimat Ruqyah bagi mereka yang memiliki ketakutan tertentu dan untuk demam setelah demam itu menimpa.

Jimat untuk Persalinan yang Sulit

Selain itu, Al-Khallal meriwayatkan bahwa Abdullah bin Ahmad berkata bahwa ayahnya menulis Ruqyah, rumus do'a Islami, sebagai jimat Islami, pada benda yang suci untuk wanita yang menderita persalinan yang sulit. Dalam jimat tersebut, Ahmad menuliskan hadith yang diriwayatkan oleh Ibn Abbas, "Tidak ada ilah yang berhak diibadahi kecuali Allah, Yang Maha Penyantun, Maha Mulia. Segala puji bagi Allah, Rabb 'Arsy yang agung.

"Segala puji dan syukur hanya bagi Allah, Rabb semesta alam (manusia, jin, dan semua yang ada)"

"Pada hari mereka melihatnya, (seolah-olah) mereka tidak tinggal (di dunia) kecuali sore hari atau pagi hari."

hikes GL Wigs I ayte gdb Onn Gad! (Fo) € QD opdnll al Yule us

"Pada hari ketika mereka melihat (azab) yang dijanjikan kepada mereka, (seolah-olah) mereka tidak tinggal kecuali sesaat di siang hari. (Wahai manusia! Quran ini cukup sebagai) pesan yang jelas (atau pengumuman untuk menyelamatkan dirimu dari kebinasaan). Tetapi adakah yang akan dibinasakan kecuali kaum Al-Fasiqun (yang durhaka terhadap perintah Allah, tidak taat kepada Allah)?" (46:35)

Al-Khallal berkata bahwa seorang laki-laki datang kepada Abu Abdullah dan memintanya untuk menuliskan rumus do'a Islami sebagai jimat untuk seorang wanita yang telah menjalani persalinan selama dua hari. Imam Ahmad meminta laki-laki itu membawa mangkuk lebar dengan beberapa kunyit [dan menuliskan jimat untuk istri laki-laki itu]. Beliau juga meriwayatkan bahwa Imam Ahmad menuliskan jimat yang sama untuk beberapa orang lainnya.

Dilaporkan bahwa 'Ikrimah meriwayatkan bahwa Ibn Abbas berkata, "Isa, utusan Allah, suatu ketika melewati seekor sapi yang sedang mengalami kesulitan melahirkan. Sapi itu berkata [kepada Isa], 'Wahai Kalimat Allah (jadilah, maka jadilah dia)! Mintalah kepada Allah untuk meringankanku dari apa yang aku derita.'

Beliau berkata, 'Wahai Pencipta jiwa dari jiwa yang lain, yang menghidupkan jiwa dari dalam jiwa yang lain, bebaskanlah dia.' Sapi itu pun melahirkan dan segera mencium anaknya yang baru lahir." Ibn Abbas kemudian berkata, "Oleh karena itu, ketika seorang wanita sedang mengalami kesulitan melahirkan, tuliskan [dan bacakan] do'a ini untuknya."

Jenis-jenis rumus do'a Islami sebagai jimat yang kami sebutkan adalah bermanfaat, insyaAllah. Lebih lanjut, beberapa ulama dari kalangan Salaf telah memperbolehkan penulisan Quran dan meminum airnya sebagai obat.

Jimat Lain untuk Wanita Hamil

Seseorang hendaknya menuliskan ayat berikut dalam wadah yang suci:

"Apabila langit terbelah. Dan tunduk serta patuh kepada Rabbnya, dan sudah semestinya begitu. Dan apabila bumi diratakan, dan memuntahkan apa yang ada di dalamnya dan menjadi kosong." (84:1 - 4)

Kemudian wanita hamil itu hendaknya meminum dari wadah ini dan menuangkan sebagiannya ke perutnya.

Jimat untuk Mimisan 464

Ibn Taymiyyah biasa menuliskan ayat berikut di dahinya:

"Dan difirmankan: 'Wahai bumi! Telanlah airmu, dan wahai langit! Berhentilah (dari hujanmu). Dan air pun surut dan Ketetapan (Allah) pun telah terlaksana (yaitu kebinasaan kaum Nuh).

Aku juga mendengar beliau berkata, "Aku telah menuliskan [ayat ini] untuk beberapa orang dan mereka sembuh." Beliau juga berkata [tentang ayat tersebut], "Tidak diperbolehkan menulisnya dengan darah mimisan sebagaimana yang dilakukan oleh sebagian orang yang tidak mengetahui, karena darah adalah najis dan seseorang tidak diperbolehkan menggunakannya untuk menulis Firman Allah."

Jimat Lain untuk Mimisan

Dilaporkan bahwa Nabi Musa suatu ketika keluar mengenakan pakaian luar kemudian mengalami mimisan dan menutupi [hidungnya].

Jimat untuk Jamur Seseorang hendaknya menuliskan [yang berikut ini untuknya:]

"kemudian ditimpa oleh angin puyuh berapi, sehingga ia terbakar...2"

~-—— Thibbun Nabawi

Jimat Lain untuk Jamur

Ketika matahari menjadi kekuningan, seseorang hendaknya menuliskan [ayat],

ct MAS SSH cal yy Lptoteg TL 251 Lats Guall GG > se bia tee a Lee te BL che cs ably SRG 4s Opteed [gs ad La tG cater)

"Wahai orang-orang yang beriman [kepada Musa (Moses) (yaitu Yahudi) dan Isa (Jesus) (yaitu Nasrani)]! Bertakwalah kepada Allah dan berimanlah kepada Rasul-Nya (Muhammad), niscaya Allah memberikan rahmat-Nya kepadamu dua bagian, dan menjadikan untukmu cahaya yang dengan cahaya itu kamu dapat berjalan (lurus). Dan Dia mengampuni kamu. Dan Allah Maha Pengampun, Maha Penyayang." (57:28)

Jimat untuk Demam Tiga Hari

Seseorang hendaknya menuliskan pada tiga lembar kertas yang terpisah, "Dengan nama Allah ia lari. Dengan nama Allah ia mereda. Dengan nama Allah ia berkurang."

Setiap hari [selama demam berlangsung], seseorang hendaknya menelan kertas tersebut dengan sedikit air. Jimat untuk Sakit Pinggang

Seseorang hendaknya menulis, "Bismillah. Ya Allah, Rabb segala sesuatu, Pemilik segala sesuatu dan Pencipta segala sesuatu! Engkau telah menciptakan urat saraf dan aku. Janganlah Engkau beri ia kekuatan atasku, dan jangan biarkan aku memotongnya. Sembuhkanlah aku dengan sempurna dan hilangkanlah penyakit ini. Tidak ada yang dapat menyembuhkan kecuali Engkau."

Jimat untuk pembuluh darah yang berdarah

Al-Tirmidhi meriwayatkan bahwa Ibn Abbas berkata bahwa Rasulullah saw biasa mengajarkan mereka untuk membaca [Ruqyah berikut], terhadap demam dan berbagai rasa sakit, "Bismillahil 'Azhim, aku berlindung kepada Allah Yang Maha Perkasa dari keburukan pembuluh darah yang berdarah dan dari keburukan panasnya api."

Jimat untuk Sakit Gigi

Seseorang hendaknya menulis pada pipi yang lebih dekat dengan rasa sakit, "Bismillahirrahmanirrahim.

(pemahaman). Sedikit sekali kamu bersyukur." (23:78) 467

——— Thibbun Nabawi Atau,

Jimat untuk abses

Seseorang hendaknya menulis [jimat ini dan meletakkannya] pada abses tersebut,

"On the Day when they will see that (torment) with which they are promised (i.e. threatened, it will be) as if they had not stayed more than an hour in a single day. (O mankind! this القرآن الكريم is sufficient as) a clear Message (or proclamation to save yourself from destruction). But shall any be destroyed except the people who are AI-Fasiqun (rebellious against الله's Command. disobedient to الله)?" (46:35)

Al-Khallal said that a man came to Abu Abdullah and asked him to write a Islamic prayer formula as an Islamic amulet for a woman who had gone into labor for two days. Imam Ahmad asked the man to bring a wide cup with some Saffron {and wrote the amulet for the man's wife]. He In addition narrated that Imam Ahmad wrote the same amulet for several other people.

It was reported that ‘Ikrimah narrated that Ibn Abbas said, "Jesus, رسول الله ﷺ b once passed by a cow that was suffering from hard labor. The cow said [to Jesus], 'O, Word of الله (be and he was)! Ask الله to relieve me from what I am suffering from.’

He said, "O Creator of the soul from another soul, who brings to life a soul from within another soul, relieves her.' The cow then gave birth and soon started to smell her newly born." Ibn Abbas then said, "Therefore, when the woman is suffering from hard labor, write [and recite] this supplication for her."

The types of Islamic prayer formulas as Islamic amulets that we mentioned are beneficial, الله willing. Further, several scholars among the Salaf have allowed writing the Qura'an and drinking its water as a cure.

Another Amulet for Pregnant Women

One should write the following Ayah in a pure pot:

"When the heaven is split asunder. In addition, listens to and obeys its Lord and it must do so. And when the earth is stretched forth, and has cast out ail that was in it and became empty." (84:1 - 4)

Then the pregnant woman should drink from this pot and pour some of it on her stomach,

An Amulet for Nosebleeds 464

Ibn Taymiyyah used to write the following Ayah on his forehead:

"And it was said: 'O earth! Swallow up your water, and O sky! Withhold (your rain). And the water was made to subside and the Decree (of الله) was fulfilled (i.e. the destruction of the people (Noah).

I In addition heard him say, "I wrote [this A/oh] for several people and they were cured." He In addition said [about the Ayah], "It is not allowed to write it with the blood of the nosebleed as some ignorant people do, because blood is impure and one is not allowed to use it to write الله's Speech.”

Another Amuiet for nose bleeds

It was reported that Prophet Musa .Once went out wearing an outer garment and then suffered from nosebleed and covered [his nose].

An Amulet for fungus One should write [the following for it:}

"then it is struck with a fiery whirlwind, so that it is burnt...2”

"O you who believe [in Musa fMoses) (i.e. Jews) and Musd (Jesus) (i.e.. Christians)|! Fear الله, and believe in His Messenger (Muhammad gg) He will give you a double portion of His Mercy. and He will give you a light by which you shall walk (straight). And He will forgive you. And الله is Oft-Forgiving. Most Merciful." (57:28)

An Amulet for three-day Fever

One should write on three separate papers, "In the Name of الله it is running away. In the Name of الله it has subsided. In the Name of الله it has decreased."

Every day [that the fever lasts], one should swallow the paper with some water. An Amulet for sciatica

One should write, "In the Name of الله. O الله, Lord of everything, Owner of everything and Creator of everything! You have created the sciatic nerve and me. Do not give it power over me, nor allow me to cut it. Heal me completely and eradicate the illness. There is none who can heal except You."

An Amulet for bleeding veins

Al-Tirmidhi narrated that Ibn Abbas said that رسول الله ﷺ b used to teach them to recite [the following Ruqyoh], against fever and various pains, 'In the Name of الله, the Most Great, I seek refuge with الله, the All-Mighty, from the evil of bleeding veins and from the evil of the fire's heat,"

An Amulet for Toothache

One should write on the cheek that is closer to the pain, "In the Name of الله, Most Gracious, Most Merciful.
